name: [GUIDE] Enable 4g+/LTE-A Carrier Aggregation without Root on Stock
snippet: Type adb devices and press enter. Type adb shell and press enter. Type su and press enter. Type setprop sys.usb.config diag,adb and press enter. [GUIDE] Enable Carrier Aggregation [LTE+] - XDA Forums LTE-Advanced Carrier Aggregation Enabler - XDA Forums More results from xdaforums.com

name: How to stop a 4G Plus network and use a normal 4G network - Quora
snippet: Enable Developer options > Dial *#*#3646633#*#* Then go to LTE CA option Select OFF Then Press SET now 4G+ is disabled in your phone.

name: How to disable 4g+ and use only 4g (non rooted POCO X3)? - Reddit
snippet: 4g+ is advanced version of 4g (it's called LTE Advanced) it uses carrier aggregation meaning combining two band to provide high speed and low ping.
